events.appearance_notes: Observed event; There are some cars driving on the road, and a person slowly approaches a green car.
events.event_text: From 0.0s to 14.2s, there are some cars driving on the road, and a person slowly approaches a green car.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; A white car slowly drove to the middle of the road.
events.event_text: From 10.0s to 15.2s, a white car slowly drove to the middle of the road.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; A black car on the main road in the distance hit the guardrail, then flew out and hit the people next to it and the white car in the middle of the road, raising a lot of dust.
events.event_text: From 14.2s to 24.0s, a black car on the main road in the distance hit the guardrail, then flew out and hit the people next to it and the white car in the middle of the road, raising a lot of dust.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The lights of the white car flashed. A man walked to the door of the white car, opened the door, looked inside and then closed it.
events.event_text: From 24.0s to 41.4s, the lights of the white car flashed. A man walked to the door of the white car, opened the door, looked inside and then closed it.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; Many vehicles are driving on the main road in the distance, and a person is wandering next to the white car.
events.event_text: From 41.4s to 60.8s, many vehicles are driving on the main road in the distance, and a person is wandering next to the white car.
